# Authentication flow mapping for Keycloak integration (2026-03-19 00:32Z)

_**User**_

Explore this repo and return a concise map of current authentication flow implementation for frontend and backend, focused on Keycloak integration. Include: 1) exact file paths for login UI, auth callback handling, token storage, and API auth headers; 2) backend endpoints related to auth/register/password-reset/token exchange; 3) any env vars controlling OIDC behavior; 4) key coupling points that would need changes to move from Keycloak-hosted login redirect to app-hosted credential forms while still using Keycloak as identity provider. Be specific and concise.

---

_**Agent (model gpt-5.3-codex, mode Agent)**_



---

I’ll quickly scan the repo for Keycloak/OIDC/auth-related code paths, then map frontend and backend flow with exact file locations and coupling points for a hosted-login-to-app-login shift.
